nodes.label: Dimension
nodes.name: Interpretive
nodes.description: Turn information into understanding and judgment. Key question: What does this mean? What's missing?

nodes.label: Dimension
nodes.name: Integrative
nodes.description: Connect parts into functioning wholes. Key question: How does this fit together?

nodes.label: Dimension
nodes.name: Interpersonal
nodes.description: Build trust, alignment, psychological safety. Key question: Who needs to be heard?

nodes.label: Dimension
nodes.name: Imaginative
nodes.description: Generate possibilities, anticipate futures. Key question: What future are we creating?
